title: mimulus tolmiei
intro: Mimulus tolmiei, also known as Tolmie's monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mimulus tolmiei include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Mimulus tolmiei can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support overall well-being.
